VO_EN: You reach into your pocket. Habit. The phone's not there. You gave it away.
VO_VI: Ban tho tay vao tui. Thoi quen. Dien thoai khong con. Ban da cho di roi.

VO_EN: Your hand still reaches.
VO_VI: Tay ban van tho vao.

VO_EN: You don't remember falling asleep that night.
VO_VI: Ban khong nho khi nao ngu thiep di toi do.

VO_EN: When you wake up your hand is curled. Like it's still holding something.
VO_VI: Khi tinh day tay ban nam lai. Nhu van con giu gi do.

VO_EN: Someone new sits down. Same chair. Same charge sheet. Same offer.
VO_VI: Mot nguoi moi ngoi xuong. Cung cai ghe. Cung to cao trang. Cung loi de nghi.

VO_EN: They look at the paper. Then at you.
VO_VI: Ho nhin to giay. Roi nhin ban.

VO_EN: You already know what they'll say.
VO_VI: Ban da biet ho se noi gi.

VO_EN: You own them.
VO_VI: Ban so huu ho.

VO_EN: You don't remember when that stopped being a figure of speech.
VO_VI: Ban khong nho khi nao dieu do ngung la mot cach noi.

VO_EN: You don't remember when it started.
VO_VI: Ban khong nho khi nao no bat dau.
